disclaimer: This map links project claims to internal documentation and synthetic examples. It does not prove external performance, ranking, platform recognition, legal compliance, or absolute AI safety.

claims.claim: The system can represent checks for dangerous or forbidden agent actions.
claims.evidence_summary: The synthetic case expects high-risk write behavior to require approval and stop release.

claims.claim: The system models trace preservation and process-level eval expectations.
claims.evidence_summary: The guide describes process traces, assertions, risk, approval requirements, and release-stop declarations.

claims.claim: The system can produce reproducible synthetic evaluation reports from local JSON files.
claims.evidence_summary: The synthetic report records deterministic case outcomes and failure classes.

claims.claim: AI answers can be evaluated for domain concept coverage and project entity recognition.
claims.evidence_summary: The runner calculates deterministic heuristic scores and reports track-level summaries.

claims.claim: The visibility suite separates general domain concept discovery from brand or entity recognition.
claims.evidence_summary: The suite defines separate groups and scoring tracks for domain, entity, comparison, and safety-boundary queries.

claims.claim: The runner does not browse, log in, call models, execute tools, or publish.
claims.evidence_summary: The runner declares and reports no-login, no-network, no-model-call, and no-external-publish boundaries.

claims.claim: The project does not guarantee SEO or GEO rankings.
claims.evidence_section: 说明 and 这个项目不是什么
claims.evidence_summary: The README states that the project is not an SEO ranking tool or GEO ranking guarantee.
